title: Figure 3 from: Gunaseelan S, Kezo K, Karunarathna SC, Yang E, Zhao C, Elgorban AM, Tibpromma S, Kaliyaperumal M (2024) New species of Tropicoporus (Basidiomycota, Hymenochaetales, Hymenochaetaceae) from India, with a key to Afro-Asian Tropicoporus species. author: Gunaseelan, Sugantha

description: Figure 3 Tropicoporus cleistanthicola (MUBL1089 holotype) A basidiomata (Holotype) B pore surface C cross-section of basidiome (arrows indicating stratified tube layers) D hymenial setae E–H basidiospores: E basidiospores in water F basidiospores in KOHG basidiospore in cotton blue H basidiospore in Melzer's reagent. Scale bars: 1 cm (A–C); 5 µm (D–H).
